problems_encountered.description: Cannot execute conversation-show because conversation-list failed with 403 permission error. No valid conversation ID available to test the show operation.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed due to missing dependency. The prerequisite conversation-list operation failed with permission denied error.
execution_notes: Unable to obtain a valid conversation ID from conversation-list due to 403 error. The authenticated user lacks permissions to list conversations. This tool requires a conversation ID which cannot be obtained without list permissions.
